title: Follow AlphaBAG on X
description: Follow the official AlphaBAG account on X (Twitter) and paste your profile link below.

title: Repost Today's Alpha Call
description: Repost the latest Alpha Call from our official X account and paste the repost link below.

title: Like & Comment on X Post
description: Like and comment on our latest post on X. Paste the link to your comment below.

title: Share AlphaBAG on X
description: Write and post a tweet about AlphaBAG using #AlphaBAG and paste the link below.

title: Quote Tweet with #AlphaBAG
description: Quote tweet any of our posts with your own commentary and the #AlphaBAG hashtag.

title: Join Telegram Community
description: Join the official AlphaBAG Telegram group and paste your Telegram username below.

title: Tag 3 Friends on X
description: Tag 3 friends in any of our X posts and paste the link to your comment below.

title: Share a Market Update on X
description: Post a crypto market update or insight to X and mention @AlphaBagPro.

title: Explore the DEX Hub
description: Visit the DEX Hub page and spend at least 2 minutes reviewing the live pairs data.

title: Browse the Alpha Feed
description: Visit the Alpha Feed and spend 2 minutes reading the latest alpha signals from the community.

title: Read the Latest Alpha Signal
description: Read and review the latest Alpha Signal posted by our analysts. Check the Signals section.

title: Check Today's Market Movers
description: Open the Global Markets page and review today's top gainers and losers.

title: Review a New Token
description: Find and review a new token in the Live Pairs screener. Spend at least 2 minutes analysing it.

title: Refer 1 Friend
description: Successfully refer a new member using your unique invite link. Each accepted referral earns XP.

title: Refer 3 Friends
description: Reach a milestone of 3 successful referrals using your unique invite link.

title: Refer 10 Friends
description: Build your network — reach 10 successful referrals and earn the Connector bonus.

title: Refer 25 Friends
description: Become a top recruiter — reach 25 total referrals and claim the Elite Connector reward.

title: Connect Your DEX Wallet
description: Connect and verify a BSC or EVM wallet address in the DEX Hub to confirm your on-chain identity.

title: Connect a CEX Account
description: Link a supported CEX account via read-only API keys in the CEX Hub settings.

title: Submit a Live Pair
description: Submit a new token pair for community review in the Live Pairs section. Must meet holding requirements.

title: Complete Your Profile Setup
description: Complete your AlphaBAG profile — set your account type, wallet address, and preferences in Settings.

title: Daily Terminal Access
description: Access the Alpha Terminal daily to maintain your engagement streak and claim your XP reward.

title: Strategic Alpha Repost
description: Repost the latest mission announcement from @AlphaBagPro on X to spread the word.

title: Community Pulse Survey
description: Participate in our weekly community poll on Telegram and share your feedback.

title: Alpha Advocate Invite
description: Invite at least 3 active traders to join the AlphaBAG community and verify their presence.
